title: youtube poop: Starscream Joins the SOS Brigade
description:
honestly, i dont have a clue.. after starscreams attempt to kill megatron PHAILED, megatron kicked him out of the decepticons... later, starscream joins the SOS brigade by accepting haruhi suzumiyas offer... then starscream creates bruticus and sets out to conquer the decepticons for haruhi suzumiya, the SOS brigade, and, odviously, revenge....? i dont know this video is a mess.. 
see account for disclaimer
enjoy
